title: Silverline 185706 Sanding Belts 75 x 457 mm 5pk 60 Grit
features: Fully resin bonded to GX51 backing cloth

description: From the manufacturer Silverline Sanding Belts 75 x 457mm 5pk Aluminium oxide abrasive grain resin bonded to X-weight backing cloth. Overlap joint with extra top-skive for reduced chatter. For sanding wood, paint, varnish, plastics, plasters and metal. Fits all 75 x 457mm belts sanders.
